creator: bugzilla.freebsd@omnilan.de
text:
(In reply to Andre Albsmeier from comment #40)

Hmm, that's strange.  Like mentioned, I only know a fraction of the DRI orchestra.
I guess you do also have
Section "Module"
        Load  "glx"
        Load  "glamoregl"
EndSection
in some conf.


For reference, that's my complete setup:
